mechanisms.description: Terminate ingest worker during write path
mechanisms.expected_behavior: system marks ingest run failed with no silent partial success

mechanisms.description: Terminate query worker while serving requests
mechanisms.expected_behavior: service restart required and cache integrity preserved

mechanisms.description: Inject shard payload corruption in test mode
mechanisms.expected_behavior: integrity detector isolates shard and reports alarm
write path exits with controlled failure and evidence bundle

mechanisms.description: Reject write attempts as read-only filesystem
mechanisms.expected_behavior: startup or ingest exits with explicit readonly diagnostics

mechanisms.description: Break control/data-plane connectivity in clustered tests
mechanisms.expected_behavior: timeouts and degraded mode are reported without data corruption

mechanisms.description: Force dependency timeout in external call path
mechanisms.expected_behavior: operation retries or fails with bounded latency

mechanisms.description: Inject invalid config payload on boot
mechanisms.expected_behavior: boot fails fast with parse diagnostics
boot fails fast with missing artifact diagnostics

mechanisms.description: Constrain process memory until allocator failure path is exercised
mechanisms.expected_behavior: runtime emits structured crash report before exit
